since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.21%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.00% · BTC +0.54% · Gold +0.59% · Nasdaq100 -1.35%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.21%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.21%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.71%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.21%, CSCO +2.82%, ARM +2.18%, DELL +2.15%, GEV +1.98%. Laggards: ISRG -13.71%, PUBM -7.36%, CRNC -6.95%, SPCX -5.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.60% at $123.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
